Main Question: What is the network which National Cycle Route 57 is part of an example of?
Sub Question: What network is National Cycle Route 57 part of?
Ground Truth: National Cycle Route 57 is part of the United Kingdom's National Cycle Network (NCN).
Reason: 预测答案“National Cycle Network”直接提供了标准答案中的核心信息，即国家自行车网络，虽然省略了“United Kingdom's”这一限定词，但问题本身询问的是所属网络名称，预测答案在语义上与标准答案的关键部分完全等价，且没有引入错误或歧义信息，因此可以视为正确回答了问题。
